svg.title: The infinite square well: energy grows as n squared
svg.desc: An infinite square well between x=0 and x=L with infinitely high walls. The first five allowed energy levels sit at relative heights 1, 4, 9, 16 and 25, and each eigenstate is drawn as a standing sine wave on its own level, with n half-waves; the gaps between levels widen as n increases.

text.tspan: The infinite square well: energy grows as n
